mapper.select: select id, user_name as userName, name, base_url as baseUrl, api_key_encrypted as apiKeyEncrypted, is_default as isDefault, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt, max_context_tokens as maxContextTokens, model_type as modelType, scope, dimensions, params, protocol as "protocol" from zephyr_model_configs where user_name = #{userName} and scope = 'user' order by created_at desc
mapper.insert: insert into zephyr_model_configs (id, user_name, name, base_url, api_key_encrypted, max_context_tokens, model_type, scope, dimensions, protocol, params, is_default, created_at, updated_at) values (#{id}, #{userName}, #{name}, #{baseUrl}, #{apiKeyEncrypted}, #{maxContextTokens}, #{modelType}, #{scope}, #{dimensions}, #{protocol}, #{params}, #{isDefault}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.delete: delete from zephyr_model_configs where id = #{id} and user_name = #{userName}
mapper.select: select id, user_name as userName, name, base_url as baseUrl, api_key_encrypted as apiKeyEncrypted, is_default as isDefault, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt, max_context_tokens as maxContextTokens, model_type as modelType, scope, dimensions, params, protocol as "protocol" from zephyr_model_configs where id = #{id}
mapper.update: update zephyr_model_configs set is_default = 0 where user_name = #{userName}
update zephyr_model_configs set is_default = 1 where id = #{id} and user_name = #{userName}
mapper.select: select id, user_name as userName, name, base_url as baseUrl, api_key_encrypted as apiKeyEncrypted, is_default as isDefault, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt, max_context_tokens as maxContextTokens, params, model_type as modelType, scope, dimensions, protocol as "protocol" from zephyr_model_configs where user_name = #{userName} and model_type = #{modelType} and scope = 'user' order by created_at desc

select id, user_name as userName, name, base_url as baseUrl, api_key_encrypted as apiKeyEncrypted, is_default as isDefault, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt, max_context_tokens as maxContextTokens, params, model_type as modelType, dimensions, protocol as "protocol" from zephyr_model_configs where model_type = #{modelType} and is_default = 1 limit 1
mapper.update: update zephyr_model_configs set is_default = 0 where model_type = #{modelType}
mapper.select: select id, user_name as userName, name, base_url as baseUrl, api_key_encrypted as apiKeyEncrypted, is_default as isDefault, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt, max_context_tokens as maxContextTokens, model_type as modelType, scope, dimensions, params, protocol as "protocol" from zephyr_model_configs where scope = 'shared' order by created_at desc
mapper.update: update zephyr_model_configs set scope = #{scope}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where id = #{id}
